description_long: This is a large, single-story bungalow set within a spacious, fenced compound featuring manicured lawns, paved walkways, and multiple garden structures. The main building has a prominent, dark hip roof with a cross at the front, suggesting a possible religious or community function. The facade is adorned with symmetrical windows and decorative elements, while the entrance is marked by a covered porch supported by columns. The grounds include gazebos, fountains, and geometric landscaping, as well as a sizable parking area adjacent to the main structure. The perimeter is enclosed by a low, white fence with regularly spaced posts. The overall design blends modern and traditional elements, emphasizing symmetry and open green spaces.
description: A large, single-story bungalow with a hip roof, symmetrical windows, and a covered front porch, set in a landscaped, fenced compound with gazebos and fountains.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a covered porch, symmetrical facade, and a cross above the doorway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large parking area, rear garden structures, and the expansive hip roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bungalow, service areas, and additional landscaping features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring gazebos, fountains, and the side elevation of the main building.
